chat_section.title: 1. Chat with Maestro
chat_section.user_message_1: Generate a social media campaign for our new eco-friendly product line.
chat_section.bot_message_1: Understood! I'll draft content for Twitter, Instagram, and LinkedIn, focusing on sustainability and innovation. Any specific hashtags or tones?
chat_section.user_message_2: Let's go with a positive, engaging tone. Use #EcoInnovate and #SustainableFuture.

orchestration_section.title: 2. Maestro Orchestrates Tasks
orchestration_section.card_1_description: AI generates content for all platforms.
orchestration_section.card_2_description: You maintain full control over outputs.

result_section.title: 3. Review AI Generated Content
result_section.draft_content: 🌱 Excited to unveil our new eco-friendly product line! Join us in building a #SustainableFuture with #EcoInnovate. Discover more: [Link]

collaboration_section.title: 4. Automated Collaboration Pipeline
collaboration_section.card_1_description: AI analyzes user comments and feedback.
collaboration_section.card_2_description: Maestro drafts and posts relevant replies.
